suspicious_activity.narrative: Patrick Williams, DOB 1998-01-09, engaged in suspicious structuring activity from 2025-08-02 to 2025-08-04. Multiple cash deposits totaling $21,998.97 and ATM withdrawals totaling $18,688.54 were made across various branches, each transaction just below $10,000. This pattern suggests an attempt to evade CTR reporting requirements. Transactions occurred at Branch_Downtown_Main, Branch_Westside_Plaza, and Branch_Northgate_Mall. Williams' profile as a midwife with an annual income of $104,667 does not align with the volume and nature of these transactions. Account IDs involved include CUST_0118_ACC_1 and CUST_0118_ACC_2. Filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Multiple cash deposits and withdrawals clustered just below $10,000 over a short period, indicating potential structuring to avoid reporting thresholds.
